forge-tsChangelogConceptsConfigurationContributingFAQGetting Started

Guides

Packages

Packages

forge-ts

forge-ts is a TypeScript documentation toolkit that performs a single AST traversal of your project and produces API docs, OpenAPI specs, executable doctests, and AI context files in one pass.

Features

  • 6 packages with full TypeScript support
  • Auto-generated API reference from source code
  • Executable @example blocks as doctests
  • AI-ready context files from a single build pass

Installation

Quick Example

Packages

PackageDescription
coreforge-ts/core — Shared types, interfaces, config loader, and AST walker. Thi...
apiforge-ts/api — OpenAPI spec and API reference generator. Extracts public SDK...
cliforge-ts/cli — Command-line interface for the forge-ts toolchain. Usage: f...
genSSG adapter registry for documentation generation. Provides pluggable adapte...
enforcerforge-ts/enforcer — TSDoc enforcement linter. Walks all exported symbols and...
doctestforge-ts/doctest — TSDoc `@example` block extractor and test runner. Extract...
